engine.title: Build a TFMG Diesel or Combustion Engine and connect it to your Create network

powered_network.title: Power your entire workshop from combustion alone — no more windmills

subtitle.text: Steam was water made violent. Oil is something older.

description: Steam runs on water and heat.
The combustion engine runs on something that used to be alive.
It is the entire narrative of the age.
TFMG Diesel/Combustion Engine: connects to your rotational network.
Lubrication Oil extends engine lifespan and efficiency.
Run diesel pipes from your distillation setup.
The factory no longer depends on water wheels or wind.
→ Build a Diesel or Combustion Engine [check]
→ Collect 2 buckets of Lubrication Oil (Distillation Tower advanced output)
→ Power your entire workshop from combustion [check]
